name: Building Entrance
description: Premium apartment entrance and gate setting for brand launch campaigns
briefInstructions: Commission a premium residential entrance background artwork. The environment is a modern Indian apartment complex entrance: a well-designed gate or entrance archway, a security cabin or visitor management point, intercom panels, a well-lit entrance pathway, premium paving, landscaping on either side. One or two people are entering or leaving naturally — a resident or visitor being welcomed. The atmosphere communicates: organized, secure, premium quality, well-managed. NO technology screens, NO software visible. The entrance itself represents the value of organized society management. Evening lighting or golden afternoon light works best. Bottom 30% smooth dark gradient for text. Top-left clean and dark for logo.

inputs.label: Campaign Headline
suggestions: The Gate to Better Society Management

inputs.label: Supporting Message
inputs.placeholder: e.g. Visitor management, billing, and compliance — all in one
suggestions: Billing, compliance, and community — all in one place
From gate to accounts — SocietyBee manages it all
